conference_layer_note: marginal ICC (0.02-0.05) — provides regularization not strong signal. Wide posteriors expected.
conf_specific_dispersion_note: CONFIRMED — Bartlett p=0.000470, Levene p=0.000705. Both tests confirm significant variance heterogeneity across conferences. r_negbinom must be a vector of length N_CONFERENCES. Prior: Gamma(2.0, 0.1) per conference independently. model_02 and model_04 must be updated before next fit. Supersedes arbitrary VMR ratio=1.5 threshold and supports EDA 01 recommendation.
prior_anchor_note: Team scoring YoY r=0.34-0.40. Prior must be anchored by SP+ and EPA, not raw scoring.
